[[Image:Giantscolours.svg|12px]] [[Huddersfield Giants]], 25 - 16 | cup_wins = 5 | cup_draws = 0 | cup_losses = 0 | cup_winners = 2009 Challenge Cup | CEO_title = Chairman | CEO = Steven Broomhead | coach_title = Head coach | coach = {{flagicon|ENG}}{{flagicon|AUS}} [[Tony Smith (rugby league b. 1967)|Tony Smith]] | captain = {{flagicon|ENG}} [[Adrian Morley]] | stadium = [[Halliwell Jones Stadium]] | avg_attendance = | agg_attendance = | high_attendance = | top_tries = | top_goals = | top_points = | prev_season = [[2008 Warrington Wolves season|2008]] | next_season = [[2010 Warrington Wolves season|2010]] | list = yes | list_link = List of Warrington Wolves seasons }} The '''2009 [[Warrington Wolves]] season''' was the 131st in the club's history. They competed in [[Super League XIV]] as well the [[2009 Challenge Cup]].
